games.title: Eight Queens
games.description: Place 8 queens on a chessboard so that no queen attacks another. A classic constraint satisfaction problem.

games.title: Memory Master
games.description: Test your memory by matching patterns and sequences. Train your brain with progressive levels.

games.title: Tower of Hanoi
games.description: Move all discs from one peg to another following the rules. A recursive puzzle classic.

games.title: Wordle
games.description: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 attempts. Get feedback on letter positions and colors.

games.title: Mastermind
games.description: Decipher the secret code using logical deduction. More attempts = lower score.
